items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a full-page cache extension, which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple vulnerabilities, including improper authorization, security mechanism bypass, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, denial-of-service, and application-level security flaws in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files disguised as images, bypassing validation and potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update resolves multiple vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized code, access store data, and compromise customer accounts.
